title: Email notifications not working
description: User is not receiving email notifications for important updates and messages.
resolution: Email was in spam folder. Added domain to whitelist.

title: Unable to upload files
description: File upload feature is not working. Getting error 'file too large' even for small files.
resolution: Browser cache issue. Cleared cache and cookies resolved the problem.

title: Account locked after multiple login attempts
description: User account got locked after entering wrong password multiple times.
resolution: Account unlocked by admin. User advised to use password manager.

title: Billing address update not saving
description: User cannot update billing address in account settings. Changes are not being saved.
resolution: Database validation error. Fixed validation rules for international addresses.

title: Search function returning no results
description: Search feature is not working properly. Returns no results even for exact matches.
resolution: Search index was corrupted. Rebuilt search index and functionality restored.
